findings.message: Feasibility may not be emitted as live TASK_DONE until target/scope confirmation allows SpecKiwi mutation or an explicit no-mutation decision is recorded.
REL-BGSTAB-001 should remain draft until non-2002 live validation and long-running browser soak evidence exists.

changes_made: Kept all generated feasibility artifacts in dry-run mode.
Separated implemented code evidence from new requirement status.
Marked REL-BGSTAB-001 stability recommendation as draft.
Added current verification results after focused frontend/server checks passed.

subagent_review.notes: The reviewer checked dry-run status, no live docs/spec mutation, pipeline rows, DocuLight claim status, and no-2002/no-kill-all-node constraints.
